positive: Minimalist woodland creature silhouette art, depicting a stylized fox and a crescent moon among ferns and stars. The design features clean, bold vector shapes, negative space utilization, and a strong monochromatic contrast using deep navy and earthy rust tones. Composition is central and circular, suitable for a t-shirt print. Style is modern folk art meets abstract engraving, with sharp edges and clean outlines. The lighting should be dramatic and diffuse, emphasizing the outlines and contrasts, printed on a plain garment background. High detail, perfect symmetry, vector illustration, isolated subject matter.
